financing_policy.promo: 0% APR for 18 months on cosmetic treatment over $2,000

insurance_policy.note: Cosmetic procedures (veneers, whitening) are elective and not covered by insurance. Implants may be partially covered when medically necessary.

classification_rules.note: Emergencies route to on-call line; cosmetic leads route to lead-conversion flow.

hot_signals: hard deadline within 8 weeks (wedding, event, photoshoot)
interest in a flagship high-value service
asks about financing (intent to buy, not just price-checking)
premium_lead_rules.escalation_policy: Hot leads -> alert front-desk channel immediately + recommend callback within 30 minutes. Warm -> alert + next-business-day follow-up. Cold -> log only.

followup_tone.guidelines: Lead with empathy for their timeline, reassure on results, make booking effortless, mention financing only as a convenience not a discount.

faq.q: Can veneers be done before a wedding in 6 weeks?
faq.a: Yes. Our veneer process typically takes 2-3 visits over ~3 weeks, so a 6-week runway is comfortable with a prompt consult.
Yes — CareCredit and Cherry, with 0% APR for 18 months on cosmetic treatment over $2,000.

faq.q: Is cosmetic work covered by insurance?
faq.a: Cosmetic procedures are elective and generally not covered, but we make them affordable through financing.
$1,200–$2,000 per tooth; most smile transformations use 8–10 veneers.
